eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bannock, ID; at 03:50 PM ON MAY 7, 2026 Effective until 08:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: McCammon City Water Boil Order - Effective ImmediatelyPer McCammon City Mayor Karlene Hall:  If you lost water pressure today Thursday May 7 2026 effective immediately you are on a water boil order.  A notice from McCammon City will follow.  Mayor Hall  208-254-3200
